# protonpass_item_identity (Resource)

Manages a Proton Pass identity item.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "protonpass_item_identity" "example" {
  share_id  = protonpass_vault.example.share_id
  title     = "Identity"
  full_name = "John Doe"
  email     = "john@example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `share_id` (String) Share ID of the vault.
- `title` (String) Title of the identity item.

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `birthdate` (String) Birth date.
- `city` (String) City.
- `company` (String) Company.
- `country_or_region` (String) Country or region.
- `email` (String) Email address.
- `first_name` (String) First name.
- `full_name` (String) Full name.
- `gender` (String) Gender.
- `job_title` (String) Job title.
- `last_name` (String) Last name.
- `license_number_wo` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) License number (write-only).
- `license_number_wo_version` (Number)
- `middle_name` (String) Middle name.
- `organization` (String) Organization.
- `passport_number_wo` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Passport number (write-only).
- `passport_number_wo_version` (Number)
- `phone_number` (String) Phone number.
- `ssn_wo` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Social Security Number (write-only).
- `ssn_wo_version` (Number)
- `state_or_province` (String) State or province.
- `street_address` (String) Street address.
- `website` (String) Website.
- `work_email` (String) Work email.
- `work_phone_number` (String) Work phone number.
- `zip_or_postal_code` (String) ZIP/Postal code.

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String)
- `item_id` (String) Unique identifier of the item.
- `modify_time` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Identity items can be imported by specifying the share ID and item ID separated by a colon
terraform import protonpass_item_identity.example "share_id:item_id"
```
